tagline: Yesterday's good news, bright and early.

stories.headline: Raúl Jiménez's Miraculous Return: From Life-Threatening Skull Fracture to World Cup Glory
stories.summary: Six years after a fractured skull nearly ended his life, Raúl Jiménez, Mexico's No. 9, completes an extraordinary comeback at the Estadio Azteca in his World Cup debut at age 35.

stories.headline: Fevered Dream: Reserve Player Scores Winning Goal on World Cup Debut
stories.summary: After four years as a reserve without a jersey number, Oh Hyeon-gyu battles a fever nearing 40 degrees to score South Korea's thrilling 2-1 comeback winner on his World Cup debut.

stories.headline: Messi's Kindness Brings a Journalist's Dream to Life
stories.summary: Venezuelan journalist Manu Gutiérrez, who uses a wheelchair due to cerebral palsy, achieves his lifelong dream interviewing Lionel Messi, now the oldest player ever to score for Argentina at 38 years old.

stories.headline: From Retirement's Edge to World Cup Hero: Goalkeeper Kim's Miraculous Return
stories.summary: A year after a career-threatening injury forced him to consider retirement, goalkeeper Kim Seung-gyu delivers crucial saves to lead South Korea to a thrilling 2-1 World Cup comeback victory.

stories.headline: Woman Leaves Water for Delivery Workers in Summer Heat, Kindness Touches Hearts
stories.summary: A thoughtful resident leaves bottles of water for exhausted delivery workers, a simple gesture that speaks volumes about caring for those serving the community.

stories.headline: Lost for 130 Years, Rare Turkish Tulip Rediscovered by Nature Lover
stories.summary: A nature enthusiast's keen eye spots the Amasya tulip thriving in northern Türkiye, alive after 130 years of presumed extinction.

stories.headline: Nearly Extinct Beetles Return Home: Decade-Long Restoration Succeeds in Ohio
stories.summary: Nearly 200 American burying beetles with adorable orange antennas, bred at Ohio State's Bug Zoo, will be released this month to restore a species that vanished from Ohio for 40 years.

stories.headline: Endangered Mountain Goats Make Stunning Comeback: Zero to 26 in Two Years
stories.summary: Indian forest officials celebrate as endangered Nilgiri Tahrs rebound from zero to 26 in just two years, reclaiming their fragmented mountain habitats.

stories.headline: Architect Walks 1,600km Across South Africa, Discovering Kindness and Connection
stories.summary: Wandile Mthiyane walks from Durban to Cape Town to raise awareness about housing inequality, discovering surprising human connection along the way.

stories.headline: United Through Crisis: Baseball Team Stages Dramatic Walk-Off Victory
stories.summary: Despite a drunk driving scandal devastating the team, Kiwoom leadoff hitter Seo Geon-chang delivers a clutch two-run walk-off single in the ninth inning for a thrilling 4-3 comeback victory.

stories.headline: Scientists Replace Platinum with Iron, Making Clean Energy Affordable for Everyone
stories.summary: Washington University engineers create a durable hydrogen fuel cell using cheap iron instead of expensive platinum, setting a world record.
